publishedAbstract: - When disks are added to the Virtual Machines used as storage nodes on vSphere, the local volumes are not automatically created by the Local Storage Operator.- The `diskmaker-manager` pod managed by the Local Storage Operator shows the following error: ~~~ ERROR controller/controller.go:324 Reconciler error ~~~
publishedTitle: Disks added to vSphere VMs are not correctly discovered by the Local Storage Operator
